name: Base Windwheel: Auxiliary Power
description: Inside the windwheel at the Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base are auxiliary turbines which ensure its smooth operation in all weather conditions. Even during strong winds, the windwheel can operate smoothly, bringing a sense of serenity to the yards. And when the air is sweltering and still, the swift rotation stirs up a refreshing breath of gentle air.
